title: The Travellers and the Bear
lines: Two Travellers were walking together when they suddenly encountered a Bear.
One Traveller quickly climbed a tree, leaving his friend behind.
The other Traveller, seeing no tree to climb, lay flat on the ground and held his breath.
The Bear sniffed at him and, thinking him dead, wandered away.
When the danger was past, the first Traveller came down from the tree.
'What did the Bear whisper to you?' he asked curiously.
'He told me," replied the other, 'never to trust a friend who leaves you in danger.'
moral: A friend in need is a friend indeed.
